chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 297 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 30-09-2025 None present for the Petitioners nor any intimation is received. On 08-09-2025 the following order was passed;- “None present for the petitioners, or any intimation received. The petition is liable to be dismissed; however, in the interest of justice, the matter is adjourned to 23-09-2025. Let notice be issued to the petitioners, and intimation notice be sent to their counsel for the next date of hearing.” Thereafter on 23-09-2025, when the matter came up for hearing in Court, Counsel for the Petitioners affected his appearance and sought time for compliance. Today, neither Petitioners nor their Counsel is in attendance, though this is a date-by-Court matter. The deliberate absence on the part of the Petitioners and their Counsel prima facie suggests that either the purpose of filing instant Petition has been served or they have lost interest in pursuing the same. Accordingly, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
